---
title: "附錄 C：參考文獻"
---

## 教科書

1. Soni NJ, Arntfield R, Kory P. *Point-of-Care Ultrasound*. 2nd ed. Elsevier; 2019.

2. Ma OJ, Mateer JR, Blaivas M. *Emergency Ultrasound*. 3rd ed. McGraw-Hill; 2014.

3. Otto CM. *Textbook of Clinical Echocardiography*. 6th ed. Elsevier; 2018.

4. Noble VE, Nelson BP. *Manual of Emergency and Critical Care Ultrasound*. 2nd ed. Cambridge University Press; 2011.

## 臨床指引

### 心臟超音波

5. Mitchell C, et al. Guidelines for Performing a Comprehensive Transthoracic Echocardiographic Examination in Adults: Recommendations from the American Society of Echocardiography. *J Am Soc Echocardiogr*. 2019;32(1):1-64.

### 急性冠心症

6. Byrne RA, et al. 2023 ESC Guidelines for the management of acute coronary syndromes. *Eur Heart J*. 2023;44(38):3720-3826.

### 主動脈疾病

7. Isselbacher EM, et al. 2022 ACC/AHA Guideline for the Diagnosis and Management of Aortic Disease. *Circulation*. 2022;146(24):e334-e482.

### 肺栓塞

8. Konstantinides SV, et al. 2019 ESC Guidelines for the diagnosis and management of acute pulmonary embolism. *Eur Heart J*. 2020;41(4):543-603.

### 急診超音波

9. American College of Emergency Physicians. Ultrasound Guidelines: Emergency, Point-of-Care and Clinical Ultrasound Guidelines in Medicine. *Ann Emerg Med*. 2023;82(4):e115-e155.

## 重要文獻

### POCUS 教育

10. Stable M, et al. Bedside echo for chest pain: an algorithm for education and assessment. *Adv Med Educ Pract*. 2016;7:293-300.

### RUSH Protocol

11. Perera P, et al. The RUSH exam: Rapid Ultrasound in SHock in the evaluation of the critically ill. *Emerg Med Clin North Am*. 2010;28(1):29-56.

### US-CAB

12. Defined by the US-CAB working group for ultrasound-guided cardiac arrest management.

## 線上資源

- **ACEP SonoGuide**: [https://www.acep.org/sonoguide](https://www.acep.org/sonoguide)
- **The POCUS Atlas**: [https://www.thepocusatlas.com](https://www.thepocusatlas.com)
- **Ultrasound GEL**: [https://www.ultrasoundgel.org](https://www.ultrasoundgel.org)
- **5 Minute Sono**: [https://www.5minsono.com](https://www.5minsono.com)
